world_sphere_tab_desc: A Mod that makes your game 3D!
is_3d_description: This is ONLY applied once you reload the world
sprite_settings_description: settings about the sprites in the game
sprites_rotate_to_camera_description: will sprites rotate to the camera?
building_style_procgen_description: Use the old stylized procedural building meshes instead of voxelizing building sprites.
inverted_camera_description: if true, the horizontal and vertical movement of the camera will be swapped
first_person_description: When Controlling a unit, you will be playing in First Person
world_settings_window: these will only apply when you regenerate the world!
cube_shape_description: Makes the World Cube. it MUST be a rectangle with the ratio 2x3
camera_rotates_with_world_description: use this if you are controlling a unit
perlin_noise_description: Will the Height of the world be affected by perlin noise?
upside_down_movement_description: if the camera is upside down, controls will be inversed
open_sprites_description: opens the folder containing mod assets, edit them and reboot the game to load
phases_window: Toggle each fork phase on/off. Reload the world for full effect.
voxel_entities_description: Replace billboarded actor / item / projectile sprites with batched voxel meshes.
procedural_buildings_description: Replace building sprites with procedural mesh + heuristic roof inference.
crossed_quad_foliage_description: Trees / bushes / rocks render as crossed quads with wind sway instead of flat billboards.
biome_blending_description: Smooth terrain vertex colors across biome edges so grass, sand, and water transition over a few tiles.
mesh_water_description: Gerstner-wave water surface overlaid on terrain with depth tint + shoreline foam.
mountain_slope_smoothing_description: Blend a smooth heightfield overlay over mountain and cliff tiles.
high_shadows_description: Real directional sun light with cascaded URP shadow maps.
skeletal_animation_description: Auto-rigged voxel actors driven by WorldBox AnimationFrameData. Compute skinning when supported.
worldspace_ui_description: Nameplates, HP bars, damage popups, and selection rings drawn in 3D world space.
day_night_cycle_description: Procedural sky + autonomous time-of-day driver. Color-temperature shift across the day.
post_fx_description: URP post-processing: bloom, color grading, vignette.
particle_effects_description: Voxel-mesh particle bursts and pooled decal projectors (scorch / blood / footprints).
sanity_cube_description: Spawn a magenta unlit cube at world center to verify the WSM3D voxel material + draw pipeline.
profile_mode_description: Dump per-system frame budget to console once per second and overlay live stats.
hdr_skybox_description: High-dynamic-range cubemap-driven skybox with IBL reflections.
color_grading_lut_description: Tonemapped LUT pass for cinematic color grading.
ssao_enabled_description: Kernel-sampled SSAO darkens crevices for added depth.
bloom_enabled_description: Soft glow on bright pixels for a cinematic look.
aces_tonemapping_description: Filmic ACES tone curve for realistic HDR-to-SDR mapping.
weather_rain_description: Falling rain droplets with downward velocity.
worldspace_health_3d_description: Worldspace 3D mesh health bars instead of legacy billboard quads.
wsm3d_welcome_message: WorldSphere 3D is installed! Voxel actors are enabled by default. Open the 3D Phases panel to enable more features.
wsm3d_quick_start_guide:
--- Quick Start ---
Voxel Actors (P1): 3D voxel units, items, projectiles
Mesh Buildings (P2): Procedural 3D buildings
Foliage (P3): Crossed-quad trees and bushes
Mesh Water (P4): Gerstner-wave water surface
Sun + Shadows (P5): Directional light + cascades
Skeletal Anim (P6): Auto-rigged voxel actors
Worldspace UI (P7): 3D nameplates and HP bars
Day/Night (P8): Procedural sky + time cycle
Post FX (P9): Bloom, SSAO, SSGI, color grading
---
Enable phases top-to-bottom for best results.
Reload the world after toggling.
